controls.title: Limit system access to authorized users
controls.description: Limit system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and devices (including other systems).

controls.title: Limit system access to types of transactions
controls.description: Limit system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute.

controls.title: Identify system users
controls.description: Identify system users, processes acting on behalf of users, or devices.
